opinion.h4: McALLISTER v. LOUISIANA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF LOUISIANA. No. 721, Misc. Decided December 16, 1963.
opinion.p: Ernest A. Carrere, Jr. for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
